hero.subtitle: DRN Tech designs and develops mobile apps, SaaS products, and automation solutions for businesses that value simplicity and efficiency.

about_brief.label: About
about_brief.body: DRN Tech is a French tech company based on the French Riviera. We design and develop digital products — from mobile apps to SaaS platforms — with a strong emphasis on usability, performance, and simplicity.

ovocio_highlight.label: Featured product
ovocio_highlight.description: The mobile app that turns your voice into professional quotes and invoices — instantly, on iOS and Android.

features.label: Voice-first

features.label: Instant
features.description: Generate professional documents in seconds, directly from your phone.

features.label: Mobile
features.description: Designed for iOS and Android, built for on-the-go professionals.

hero.label: About
hero.title: DRN Tech was born from a simple conviction: technology should solve real problems.
hero.body: We build mobile apps and SaaS products for everyday users, custom tools integrated into businesses, and turnkey websites — always with the same goal: creating solutions that are useful, easy to use, and built to last.

items.title: Apps & SaaS for everyone
items.description: We build mobile apps and SaaS products designed for everyday users — with a focus on real-world usefulness and ease of use.

items.title: Custom tools for businesses
items.description: We design and integrate tailored solutions built around your workflows, not the other way around.

items.title: Turnkey websites
items.description: Professional websites that are fast, easy to manage, and ready to grow with your business.

items.label: Useful first
items.description: We only build what solves a real problem.

items.label: Truly simple
items.description: If it requires a manual, it is not finished yet.

items.label: Built to last
items.description: We design our products to adapt and evolve over time, not just to ship.

hero.label: Ovocio
hero.description: Ovocio is a mobile app for iOS and Android that turns what you say into professional documents — instantly, wherever you are.

items.title: Create by voice
items.description: Dictate your quote or invoice naturally — Ovocio handles the structure, the formatting, and the math.

items.title: Ready in seconds
items.description: From spoken words to a professional document in under a minute. No typing, no back-office.

items.title: Always with you
items.description: Designed for mobile from the ground up. Open it on-site, in the car, or between two appointments.

items.title: Professional output
items.description: Clean, ready-to-send PDFs that look polished — every time, without effort.

audiences.label: Who it's for
audiences.title: Made for people on the move

items.title: Freelancers & consultants
items.description: Stop losing time on admin. Create quotes between two calls and send invoices the moment the job is done.

items.title: Tradespeople & craftspeople
items.description: Quote on-site without paper. Your client gets a professional document before you've even left.

items.title: Sales reps & field teams
items.description: Keep moving. Turn a client conversation into a formal quote without ever opening a laptop.

closing.title: Ready to try Ovocio?
closing.subtitle: Download it now on iOS or Android.

sections.title: 2. Data Collected
sections.body: This website does not collect any personal data. There is no contact form, no newsletter subscription, and no user account system. No personal information is requested from or stored about visitors.

sections.title: 3. Cookies
sections.body: This website does not use any tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or advertising cookies. No cookie banner is displayed because no cookies requiring consent are set.

sections.title: 4. Hosting & Technical Logs
sections.body: This website is hosted by Vercel Inc., 340 Pine Street Suite 701, San Francisco, CA 94104, USA. As part of normal server operations, Vercel may automatically collect technical logs (IP addresses, browser type, pages visited, timestamps). These logs are retained and processed by Vercel in accordance with their own privacy policy, available at vercel.com/legal/privacy-policy.

sections.title: 5. Your Rights (GDPR)
sections.body: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (EU) 2016/679, you have the right to access, rectify, and request the deletion of any personal data concerning you. Since this website does not collect personal data directly, any such request would relate to technical logs held by the hosting provider. For any privacy-related inquiry, contact us at:
